title: BEM-971 SHA snippet diag
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text()
idx = text.find('commit_sha')
if idx < 0:
    snippet = 'commit_sha_not_found'
else:
    start = idx - 250
    if start < 0:
        start = 0
    end = idx + 700
    snippet = text[start:end]
diag = Path('governance/reports/BEM971_COMMIT_SHA_SNIPPET_DIAG.txt')
diag.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
diag.write_text('idx=' + str(idx) + '\n---SNIPPET---\n' + snippet + '\n---END---\n')
changed_files.append(str(diag))
ops_applied.append('bem971_commit_sha_snippet_diag')
"""
